title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description: Lead the development of product-facing React experiences with strong attention to performance, accessibility, and design collaboration.
requirements: Strong grasp of component architecture and API integration
Experience translating polished UI concepts into production-ready code

title: Backend Developer
description: Build scalable Node.js services, maintain MongoDB-backed APIs, and collaborate on reliable integrations for fast-growing commerce workflows.
requirements: Experience with MongoDB and schema design
Understanding of REST APIs and authentication basics

title: Product Designer
description: Design intuitive, business-ready product flows across dashboards, onboarding journeys, and internal tooling with strong product thinking.
requirements: Portfolio showcasing UX and visual design work
Comfort working with developers and product managers
Experience in Figma and design systems

title: Data Analyst
description: Translate hiring and product data into clear dashboards, stakeholder insights, and performance reports that guide better team decisions.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Ship polished mobile features, collaborate with backend teams, and help shape a consistent product experience across devices.
requirements: Experience with React Native or Flutter
Ability to debug performance issues on mobile

title: Talent Operations Intern
description: Support job operations, candidate coordination, and dashboard updates while learning how a modern hiring platform runs day to day.
